data.body: POST-CLOSE (test-quality pass, 813dd5c8): added lint-contract coverage that was missing — injection guard (raw ${{}} in identifier / in a with: key), if: guard (bare / secret), type: discriminator mismatch, agent-field-on-scripted, index_var binding scope, multiple-terminals, closed-allow-list rejection; plus migrated-v1-validates-against-the-v2-schema. All green.
